title: Scalar function without input parameters
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table_1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table_1 (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test1'), (2, 'test2'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 AS SELECT id, COALESCE(value, 'default') AS value FROM test_table_1;
SELECT RANDOM() FROM test_table_2 WHERE id > 1;
SELECT RANDOM() FROM (SELECT id FROM test_table_1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS subquery;
key_bug_features: Scalar function registered without input parameters returns incorrect chunk size
